name: python3-flask-restful
title: python3-flask-restful
summary: REST API framework for Flask applications (Python3 Module)
description:
REST API framework for Flask applications (Python3 Module)
Flask-RESTful is an extension for Flask that adds support for quickly building
REST APIs. It is a lightweight abstraction that works with your existing
ORM/libraries. Flask-RESTful encourages best practices with minimal setup.
If you are familiar with Flask, Flask-RESTful should be easy to pick up.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-flask-restful because REST API framework for Flask applications (Python3 Module).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-flask-restful as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-flask-restful with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-flask-restful --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
